draft_text:
# LEGAL NOTICE

---

**FROM:**

**RHUGVED DANGUI**
[Full Address of Landlord]
Contact: [Phone Number]
Email: [Email Address]

**Through/By:**
[Name of Advocate/Law Firm, if applicable]
[Full Address of Advocate/Law Firm]

---

**TO:**

**XYZ LTD.**
[Registered Office Address of Tenant]
[Company Identification Number, if applicable]

---

**DATE:** [DATE OF NOTICE]

**PLACE:** [PLACE OF ISSUANCE]

---

## SUBJECT: LEGAL NOTICE FOR [BRIEF DESCRIPTION OF ISSUE — E.G., RECOVERY OF OUTSTANDING RENT / TERMINATION OF TENANCY / RECOVERY OF POSSESSION OF PREMISES]

---

Madam/Sir,

We are in receipt of instructions from our client, **Mr. Rhugved Dangui** (hereinafter referred to as "the **Landlord**"), to address you regarding the matter stated herein. We are writing this Legal Notice on behalf of our client, and all communications henceforth shall be addressed to us.

---

## I. FACTS

1. That our client, **Rhugved Dangui**, is the sole and absolute owner of the more particularly described property bearing address **[PROPERTY FULL ADDRESS]** (hereinafter referred to as "the **Demised Premises**" or "the **Property**").

2. That pursuant to a registered/titled Tenancy Agreement dated **[AGREEMENT DATE]**, executed at **[PLACE]**, our client granted the Demised Premises on rent/lease to your good self/company, **XYZ Ltd.** (hereinafter referred to as "the **Tenant**"), for the purpose of **[PURPOSE OF USE — OFFICE/RESIDENCE]**.

3. That the material terms of the said Tenancy Agreement are as under:

   a) **Tenancy Duration:** The tenancy was for a period of **[TENANCY DURATION]**, commencing from **[TENANCY START DATE]** and ending on **[TENANCY END DATE]**.

   b) **Lock-in Period:** The tenancy had a lock-in period of **[LOCK IN PERIOD]**, during which neither party could terminate the agreement without due process.

   c) **Monthly Rent:** The Tenant was obligated to pay monthly rent of **[Rs. AMOUNT]** (Rupees [Amount in Words] only) on or before the **[RENT PAYMENT DATE]** of each calendar month.

   d) **Security Deposit:** The Tenant had deposited a sum of **[Rs. AMOUNT]** (Rupees [Amount in Words] only) as refundable security deposit with our client.

   e) **Maintenance Charges:** The Tenant was liable to pay monthly maintenance charges of **[MAINTENANCE CHARGES]** in addition to the agreed rent.

   f) **Parking:** The Tenant was entitled to [PARKING DETAILS] as part of the tenancy agreement.

   g) **Payment Method:** All payments were to be made through **[PAYMENT METHOD]**.

   h) **Other Terms:** [ANY OTHER TERMS as agreed between the parties]

4. That the said Tenancy Agreement was duly executed and binding upon both parties, with [WITNESS 1 NAME] and [WITNESS 2 NAME] acting as witnesses to the same.

5. That the Tenant entered into possession of the Demised Premises on **[TENANCY START DATE]** and has been occupying the same since then.

6. **That it has come to the notice of our client, and we are instructed to state, as follows:**

   **[INSERT SPECIFIC GRIEVANCE — E.G.:**
   
   **(a)** *The Tenant has defaulted in payment of rent for the months of [MONTHS], thereby withholding an amount of Rs. [AMOUNT];*
   
   **(b)** *The Tenant has failed to pay maintenance charges amounting to Rs. [AMOUNT];*
   
   **(c)** *The Tenant has violated clauses [CLAUSE NUMBERS] of the Tenancy Agreement by [DESCRIPTION OF VIOLATION];*
   
   **(d)** *The Tenant has caused unauthorized alterations/damages to the Demised Premises;*
   
   **(e)** *The tenancy has expired, and the Tenant has failed to vacate the premises despite [NOTICE PERIOD] notice;*
   
   **(f)** *Any other specific breach as applicable]*

7. That our client has made numerous oral and written requests to your good self/company to rectify the above-mentioned defaults/breaches, however, you have failed, neglected, and/or refused to address the same despite sufficient opportunity being afforded to you.

8. That the continued default/breach on your part has caused immense mental agony, harassment, and financial loss to our client, and the same is untenable in law.

---

## II. LEGAL BASIS

1. That the Tenancy Agreement dated **[AGREEMENT DATE]** executed between the parties is a valid, binding, and enforceable contract, and the terms and conditions stipulated therein are legally binding on both parties.

2. That as per the provisions of the Transfer of Property Act, 1882, especially Sections 106 and 108, the relationship of Landlord and Tenant has been duly established, and the rights and obligations of both parties are well-defined under law.

3. That the Rent Control Act applicable in the concerned jurisdiction, namely **[NAME OF APPLICABLE RENT CONTROL ACT]**, provides for the rights and remedies available to landlords in case of default by tenants.

4. That the Tenant, by failing to comply with the terms of the Tenancy Agreement, has committed a breach of contract, and our client is entitled to all rights and remedies available under law, including but not limited to:

   a) Recovery of outstanding dues along with interest at the agreed rate;
   
   b) Termination of the tenancy and recovery of possession of the Demised Premises;
   
   c) Damages for wrongful use/occupation of the Demised Premises;
   
   d) Costs and expenses incurred in the prosecution of this matter.

5. That the Tenant is estopped from denying the title of our client or disputing the terms of the tenancy agreement, as the same has been acknowledged and acted upon by both parties.

6. That the law is well-settled that a landlord is entitled to reasonable rent and quiet possession of his/her property, and any unauthorized retention or default in payment constitutes a valid cause of action.

---

## III. DEMAND

That in view of the foregoing facts and legal basis, **we hereby call upon and demand** your good self/company to:

**1.** Pay/Remit the sum of **[Rs. AMOUNT]** (Rupees [Amount in Words] only) towards outstanding rent for the period [PERIOD], along with interest @ [RATE]% per annum, within **fifteen (15) days** from the date of receipt of this Legal Notice;

**2.** Pay/Remit the outstanding maintenance charges of **[Rs. AMOUNT]** (Rupees [Amount in Words] only) within the same period;

**3.** [AND/OR] Restore the Demised Premises to its original condition at your own cost within **[NUMBER]** days;

**4.** [AND/OR] Vacate and hand over peaceful, vacant, and physical possession of the Demised Premises to our client, along with all keys, access cards, and other access mechanisms, within **fifteen (15) days** from the date of receipt of this Legal Notice;

**5.** Pay/Remit damages for wrongful use and occupation of the Demised Premises at the rate of **Rs. [AMOUNT]** per month from **[DATE]** until date of actual vacation, within **fifteen (15) days** of vacation;

**6.** Clear all outstanding dues, including but not limited to electricity bills, water charges, maintenance charges, and any other utilities consumed during your period of occupation.

---

## IV. CONSEQUENCE OF NON-COMPLIANCE

**TAKE NOTICE** that in the event you fail, neglect, or refuse to comply with the demands set out herein within **fifteen (15) days** from the date of receipt of this Legal Notice, our client shall be constrained to initiate appropriate legal proceedings against your good self/company, including but not limited to:

1. Filing a suit for recovery of outstanding rent and damages before the competent Court of Law;

2. Filing an application for eviction/recovery of possession under the provisions of the applicable Rent Control Act;

3. Claiming mesne profits/damages for the period of unauthorized occupation;

4. Claiming costs, charges, and expenses (including advocate fees) incurred in the prosecution of such legal proceedings;

5. Taking such other and further actions as may be available under law.

**You are hereby put to notice** that any
